assertions.title: Dashboard loads at / with all 5 cards and bar chart visible

steps.observed: Dashboard loaded with I&M HVAC branding and navigation header

steps.action: Wait for page to load completely
steps.expected: All dashboard cards and charts are visible
steps.observed: All 5 cards rendered: Total Calls, Answered vs Voicemail, Qualified Leads, Average Call Duration, ROI Estimate. Bar chart area visible at bottom.

assertions.title: Total Calls shows all-time, this-week, today counts with big numbers

steps.expected: Card displays three counts: all-time, this-week, and today with large numbers
steps.observed: Card shows 'ALL TIME' with big '0', 'THIS WEEK' with '0', and 'TODAY' with '0'. Numbers are displayed prominently.

assertions.title: Donut chart shows answered vs voicemail ratio with green/gray colors and legend

steps.expected: Donut chart displays with green for answered, gray for voicemail, and includes legend
steps.observed: Chart shows 'No calls yet' placeholder state. Legend displays 'Answered: 0' with green dot and 'Voicemail: 0' with gray dot.

assertions.title: Donut chart shows empty/placeholder state when 0 calls

steps.expected: Chart shows placeholder when no call data exists
steps.observed: Chart displays 'No calls yet' text in the center with dotted border placeholder style. Legend shows both categories at 0.

assertions.title: Qualified Leads shows correct count (answered + name + request populated)

steps.expected: Card displays count of qualified leads with description
steps.observed: Card shows '0' with description 'Answered calls with both name and request filled'.

frictions.description: Dashboard shows error banner 'Unable to load dashboard data right now' due to Google Sheets API 500 error. The UI gracefully handles this by showing 0 values and placeholder states.
frictions.resolution: Dashboard implements proper error handling with fallback UI - cards show 0 values and donut chart shows 'No calls yet' placeholder

summary: All 5 assertions passed. The dashboard loaded successfully with all 5 cards (Total Calls, Answered vs Voicemail, Qualified Leads, Average Call Duration, ROI Estimate) and the 14-day bar chart area visible. Despite a 500 error from the Google Sheets API, the dashboard gracefully handled the error state by displaying 0 values and appropriate placeholder text ('No calls yet'). The donut chart correctly shows the legend with green (Answered) and gray (Voicemail) color indicators. No console errors were present.
